name: Barline
description: Tall bars of varying width standing in columns, each post re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: @pick(16%, 30%, 46%, 62%); height: 100%; margin: 0 auto; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
